scripts.test:notifications: npm run build && node lib/notifications/__tests__/scenarioKeys.test.js && node lib/notifications/__tests__/quietHours.test.js && node lib/notifications/__tests__/dispatchGuard.test.js && node lib/notifications/__tests__/sendPush.test.js
scripts.test: npm run test:studios && npm run test:notifications
scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
scripts.deploy: npm run build && firebase deploy --only functions
